text.title: Freelancer Inbound Reply Template Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) pinning the shape of a valid Freelancer Inbound Reply Template artefact. The validator script enforces required keys, types, and the forbidden-pattern list before the orchestrator accepts the output.

section.title: Schema

example.note: Minimum viable conformant output — every required field present, no forbidden pattern matched. Used as the `--self-test` fixture by `scripts/validate-freelancer-inbound-reply-template.py`.
Missing every required field; no owner, no template_version, no evidence array — rejected by `validate-freelancer-inbound-reply-template.py` with exit 1.

forbidden.pattern: Field declared as list/object in the schema is emitted as prose paragraph.
`template_version` empty or set to a string that does not match the methodology frontmatter at write time.
`evidence` array empty for any non-trivial field declared in the schema.
Agent self-approves the artefact (`status=approved`) without a named human reviewer distinct from the producing agent.

text.reference: Schema validator (stdlib only). Exit 0 on pass, 1 on fail with violation list.
